specializations: Carrier peptides and growth factor technologies
product_highlights: Growth factor technologies for advanced skin repair
notes: Founded in 2001, Caregen is a South Korean biotech company pioneering advanced peptide and growth factor technologies for cosmetic applications. Their flagship carrier peptide, Copper Tripeptide-1 (GHK-Cu), is widely recognized for wound healing, collagen synthesis, and anti-aging benefits. Caregen integrates eco-friendly practices into their production process and offers a comprehensive portfolio of signal, carrier, and enzyme inhibitor peptides for premium skincare formulations.
